Bash("/c/Users/gonza/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe" -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import os

# Check which dates have which files
base = ''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/databento/NQ''
dates = sorted\(os.listdir\(base\)\)
file_types = {}
for d in dates:
    dirpath = os.path.join\(base, d\)
    if os.path.isdir\(dirpath\):
        files = os.listdir\(dirpath\)
        for f in files:
            file_types.setdefault\(f, []\).append\(d\)

print\(''=== FILE TYPES ACROSS ALL DATES ===''\)
for f, dlist in sorted\(file_types.items\(\)\):
    print\(f''{f}: {len\(dlist\)} dates \(first: {dlist[0]}, last: {dlist[-1]}\)''\)

# Count empty dirs
empty = [d for d in dates if os.path.isdir\(os.path.join\(base, d\)\) and len\(os.listdir\(os.path.join\(base, d\)\)\) == 0]
print\(f''\\nEmpty directories: {len\(empty\)}''\)
if empty:
    print\(f''  Examples: {empty[:5]}''\)
")

import pyarrow.parquet as pq

# Read ohlcv_1m schema
path = ''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/databento/NQ/2025-11-18/ohlcv_1m.parquet''
import os
if not os.path.exists\(path\):
    # find a date that has it
    base = ''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/databento/NQ''
    for d in sorted\(os.listdir\(base\)\):
        p = os.path.join\(base, d, ''ohlcv_1m.parquet''\)
        if os.path.exists\(p\):
            path = p
            break

schema = pq.read_schema\(path\)
meta = pq.read_metadata\(path\)
print\(f''=== ohlcv_1m.parquet SCHEMA \({path}\) ===''\)
print\(schema\)
print\(f''\\nNum rows: {meta.num_rows}, Num columns: {meta.num_columns}''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/gonza/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
# Load labeled events to find events with data
le = pd.read_parquet\(''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/experiment/labeled_events.parquet''\)
fm = pd.read_parquet\(''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/experiment/feature_matrix.parquet''\)

# Show first 5 resolved events with their features
resolved = le[le[''label''] != ''no_resolution''].head\(5\)
for i, \(_, ev\) in enumerate\(resolved.iterrows\(\)\):
    ts = pd.Timestamp\(ev[''event_ts'']\)
    date_str = ev[''date'']
    # Find matching feature row
    fm_match = fm[fm[''event_ts''] == ev[''event_ts'']]
    if not fm_match.empty:
        fm_row = fm_match.iloc[0]
        print\(f''Event {i}: date={date_str} ts={ts} dir={ev[""direction""]} rep_price={ev[""representative_price""]}''\)
        print\(f''  time_beyond={fm_row[""int_time_beyond_level""]:.4f}''\)
        print\(f''  time_within={fm_row[""int_time_within_2pts""]:.4f}''\)
        print\(f''  absorption={fm_row[""int_absorption_ratio""]:.4f}''\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/gonza/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe" -c "
import pandas as pd
le = pd.read_parquet\(''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/experiment/labeled_events.parquet''\)
fm = pd.read_parquet\(''c:/Users/gonza/Documents/Claude-Quant-Lab/data/experiment/feature_matrix.parquet''\)

resolved = le[le[''label''] != ''no_resolution''].head\(5\)
print\(''Labeled events columns:'', list\(le.columns\)\)
print\(''Feature matrix columns with int_:'', [c for c in fm.columns if c.startswith\(''int_time''\) or c.startswith\(''int_abs''\)]\)
print\(\)

for i, \(idx, ev\) in enumerate\(resolved.iterrows\(\)\):
    ts = pd.Timestamp\(ev[''event_ts'']\)
    date_str = ev[''date'']
    
    # Match by date and timestamp
    fm_sub = fm[\(fm[''event_ts''].astype\(str\) == str\(ev[''event_ts'']\)\)]
    if fm_sub.empty:
        # Try matching by date and approximate time
        fm_sub = fm[fm[''date''] == date_str]
    
    print\(f''Event {i}: date={date_str} ts={ts} dir={ev[""direction""]} rep={ev[""representative_price""]}''\)
    if not fm_sub.empty:
        row = fm_sub.iloc[0] if len\(fm_sub\) == 1 else fm_sub.iloc[i if i < len\(fm_sub\) else 0]
        print\(f''  beyond={row[""int_time_beyond_level""]:.4f}  within={row[""int_time_within_2pts""]:.4f}  absorb={row[""int_absorption_ratio""]:.4f}''\)
    else:
        print\(''  NO MATCH in feature matrix''\)
    print\(\)
")

fm = pd.read_parquet\(''data/experiment/feature_matrix.parquet''\)

print\(''Event TS str:'', str\(ev_ts\)\)
print\(\)

# Check FM matching

print\(f''Match by str: {len\(match\)}''\)

# Try direct comparison

Bash("/c/Users/gonza/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe" -c "
from catboost import CatBoostClassifier

CLASS_NAMES = {0: ''tradeable_reversal'', 1: ''trap_reversal'', 2: ''aggressive_blowthrough''}

loaded = CatBoostClassifier\(\)
loaded.load_model\(''data/models/dashboard_3feature_v1.cbm''\)

test_input = [[30.0, 45.0, 0.5]]
pred_class = int\(loaded.predict\(test_input\).flatten\(\)[0]\)
pred_probs = loaded.predict_proba\(test_input\)[0]

print\(''VERIFICATION''\)
print\(f''  Test input: {test_input[0]}''\)
print\(f''  Predicted class: {pred_class} \({CLASS_NAMES[pred_class]}\)''\)
print\(f''  Probabilities:''\)
for name, prob in zip\(CLASS_NAMES.values\(\), pred_probs\):
    print\(f''    {name:30s}  {prob:.6f}''\)
print\(f''  Sum of probabilities: {sum\(pred_probs\):.10f}''\)
print\(f''  Valid \(sums to 1.0\): {abs\(sum\(pred_probs\) - 1.0\) < 1e-6}''\)
print\(f''  Feature names: {loaded.feature_names_}''\)
print\(f''  3 features expected, model has: {len\(loaded.feature_names_\) if loaded.feature_names_ else ""unknown""}''\)
print\(f''  Model classes: {loaded.classes_}''\)
")

import duckdb, pathlib
conn = duckdb.connect\(\)

# Check OHLCV session bars format
f = ''data/databento/NQ/2025-11-17/ohlcv_1m_session.parquet''
df = conn.execute\(f""SELECT * FROM read_parquet\(''{f}''\) LIMIT 5""\).fetchdf\(\)
print\(''OHLCV session bars columns:'', list\(df.columns\)\)
print\(df[[''ts_event'',''open'',''high'',''low'',''close'',''volume'']].to_string\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\(''Total bars:'', conn.execute\(f""SELECT count\(*\) FROM read_parquet\(''{f}''\)""\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

# Count available dates
dates = sorted\([d.name for d in pathlib.Path\(''data/databento/NQ''\).iterdir\(\) if d.is_dir\(\)]\)
print\(f''\\nTotal dates: {len\(dates\)}''\)
print\(f''Range: {dates[0]} to {dates[-1]}''\)

# For the backtest, I need to filter front-month only
# Check action=''T'' count and symbol distribution
f2 = ''data/databento/NQ/2025-11-17/mbp10.parquet''
print\(\)
r = conn.execute\(f""SELECT symbol, count\(*\) as n FROM read_parquet\(''{f2}''\) WHERE action=''T'' GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY n DESC""\).fetchall\(\)
print\(''Trade counts by symbol:''\)
for sym, n in r:
    print\(f''  {sym}: {n:,}''\)

r2 = conn.execute\(f""SELECT symbol, count\(*\) as n FROM read_parquet\(''{f2}''\) WHERE action != ''T'' GROUP BY symbol ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5""\).fetchall\(\)
print\(\)
print\(''Non-trade \(book update\) counts by symbol:''\)
for sym, n in r2:
    print\(f''  {sym}: {n:,}''\)
")
